mapper.insert:
select seq_board.netval from dual
INSERT INTO tbl_board ( bno, title, content, writer, attach ) VALUES ( ${bno}, #{title}, #{content}, #{writer}, #{attach} )

SELECT seq_board.nextval FROM dual
INSERT INTO tbl_board ( bno, title, content, writer) VALUES ( #{bno}, #{title}, #{content}, #{writer})
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_board SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, writer = #{writer}, updateDate = sysdate WHERE bno = #{bno}
mapper.select: SELECT bno, title, content, writer, regdate, attach FROM tbl_board WHERE bno = #{bno}
SELECT bno, title, content, writer, regdate, attach FROM tbl_board
